title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-19
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: The greenhouse took attendance
gist.blurb: The daily garden ledger has been refreshed. App metrics, health checks, and greenhouse notes are back in their proper little rows.
gist.summary: Updated apps/APPS.md and apps/GREENHOUSE.md with the 2026-07-19 automated app metrics, health-check results, and greenhouse status.
gist.impact: Community maintainers have a current snapshot of app activity and health without changing the apps themselves.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy community app greenhouse where Polly checks a clipboard beside labeled code-plants, while a small CRT monitor robot reads fresh health metrics from a lime-green terminal. The visual represents an automated daily inventory and healthy garden upkeep rather than a product feature.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny gardener visor, checking a clipboard in a greenhouse full of code-plants and pixel flowers while a friendly CRT monitor robot displays neat app health checkmarks on a lime green (#ecf874) terminal. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, with subtle pixel-font text: 'DAILY METRICS'.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny gardener visor, checking a clipboard in a greenhouse full of code-plants and pixel flowers while a friendly CRT monitor robot displays neat app health checkmarks on a lime green (#ecf874) terminal. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, with subtle pixel-font text: 'DAILY METRICS'.
